observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with sewing fault
Visual pattern suggesting fabric edge defect
Localized deviation from normal zipper appearance
mechanism_explanation: Sewing machine malfunction creates irregular stitching at fabric edges.
defect_region: along the zipper teeth or fabric
severity_visual_description: moderate fabric edge defect visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Replace sewing needle and adjust thread tension.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the fabric edge defect would be absent and surface appears normal.
